review_text: Pathetic customer service. I paid for 2 shorts but received only 1. Instead of investigating, Zepto blindly accepted the seller's false claim that everything was delivered. No accountability, no resolution. Completely unacceptable and a breach of customer trust.

Very poor This is now the 4th or 5th time I've received my order without proper packaging. I've raised this issue with your customer support multiple times before, but nothing has changed. This is extremely disappointing. I requested appropriate compensation for this repeated inconvenience, but instead, I was only offered brand coupons, which are of no use to me. As a loyal customer, I expect a proper resolution, not coupons.

The delivery partner didn't have change, and if you pay with cash without the exact amount, they may cancel the order. Zepto can even block the Cash on Delivery (COD) option on your account without any proper explanation. It's disappointing that delivery partners often don't carry change, which creates unnecessary inconvenience for customers. I would recommend using Blinkit instead, as their service has been much better in my experience.

Pathetic customer service. They deliver damaged products and dont even acknowledge it. Forget getting a return, they don't accept they delivered damaged products. Their customer care is of no use. I hope this app and company gets destroyed and bankrupt for looting people and doing this to innocent ones.

Very disappointing experience. I received a spoiled food product that was clearly unfit for consumption. Even after sharing photos as proof, my complaint was rejected based on their internal quality check. Poor quality control and disappointing customer service. Unfortunately, I have lost trust in Zepto and will not be ordering again.

My previous experience was good, but today's experience was very disappointing. I ordered a prepaid shirt because I urgently needed it for my office. The delivery was delayed, and I never received the OTP. Both the delivery partner and I tried contacting customer support multiple times, but there was no response. Since it was an emergency, I wore the shirt. Later, the delivery partner asked me to return it because the delivery could not be completed without the OTP. This was very embarrassing

Thank you.
